results.definition_en: A group of people picked to do work for others.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 委員會；受指派處理事務的一群人。
results.example_en: The committee will meet on Monday.

results.definition_en: A group of people working together to do business.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 公司、商號；共同經商的團體。
results.example_en: She works for a small company in town.
results.example_zh_tw: 她在鎮上的一家小公司工作。

results.definition_en: The act of looking at two things to see how they are the same or not.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 比較、對照；觀察兩者異同的動作。
results.example_en: In comparison, this book is better.
results.example_zh_tw: 相比之下，這本書比較好。

results.definition_en: A test or game where people try to be the best.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 競爭、比賽；眾人爭勝的活動。
results.example_en: She is in a song competition this week.
results.example_zh_tw: 她這禮拜要參加一場歌唱比賽。

results.definition_en: The state a thing is in; how good or bad it is.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 狀況、條件；事物的狀態或先決要件。
results.example_en: The car is in good condition.

results.definition_en: The way two things are joined together.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 連結、聯繫；兩者相連的關係。
results.example_en: There is a connection between the two rooms.
results.example_zh_tw: 那兩個房間之間有通道相連。

results.definition_en: The power to say what something will do.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 控制、掌控；決定事物動向的能力。
results.example_en: She has control of the school.

results.definition_en: A person whose work is to make food ready to eat.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 廚師；負責準備食物的人。
results.example_en: Our cook makes the best bread.
results.example_zh_tw: 我們的廚師做的麵包最好吃。

results.definition_en: A soft red-brown metal used for wires and pots.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 銅；紅褐色軟金屬，常用於電線和器皿。
results.example_en: The pot is made of copper.

results.definition_en: A thing made to look the same as another.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 副本、拷貝；仿作或複製品。
results.example_en: Please make a copy of this letter.

results.definition_en: A light, soft material from a tree, used to keep liquid in a bottle.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 軟木塞；用於封住瓶口的輕軟材料。
results.example_en: She pulled the cork out of the wine bottle.
results.example_zh_tw: 她把酒瓶上的軟木塞拔出來。

results.definition_en: A soft white material from a plant, used to make cloth.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 棉、棉花；棉花植物的纖維，可織布。
results.example_en: This shirt is made of cotton.

results.definition_en: A sudden push of air out of the throat, often when one is ill.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 咳嗽；自喉嚨突然送出的氣流。
results.example_en: She has a bad cough today.

results.definition_en: A land with its own people and government; or land far from a town.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 國家；或鄉間、郊野。
results.example_en: He lives in a small country in the north.
results.example_zh_tw: 他住在北方的一個小國。

results.definition_en: Something put over a thing to keep it safe or hide it.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 覆蓋、罩子；用以遮蔽或保護之物。
results.example_en: Put a cover on the box.

results.definition_en: A thin opening in a thing where it has broken a little.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 裂縫、裂痕；物體上的細小破口。
results.example_en: There is a crack in the cup.

results.definition_en: Trust given to a person to pay later for what they get now.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 信用、賒帳；可延後付款的信任。
results.example_en: She bought the food on credit.

results.definition_en: A bad act that the law says is wrong.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 犯罪；違反法律的惡行。
results.example_en: Stealing is a crime in every country.
results.example_zh_tw: 偷竊在哪個國家都是犯罪。

results.definition_en: The act of pressing a thing so hard that it loses its form.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 壓碎、擠壓；用力壓使物體變形。
results.example_en: Do not crush the flowers in the box.
results.example_zh_tw: 別把箱子裡的花壓壞了。

results.definition_en: The sound made when one is sad, or a loud call.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 哭、叫喊；悲傷或大聲呼喚的聲音。
results.example_en: The baby gave a small cry.

results.definition_en: The way water or air keeps moving in one direction.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 水流、氣流；液體或氣體的流向。
results.example_en: The river has a strong current here.

results.definition_en: A line that is not straight, going round in a smooth bend.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 曲線；非直線、平滑彎曲的線。
results.example_en: The road has a sharp curve here.

results.definition_en: Harm done to a thing so it does not work as well.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 損害、損壞；使事物受損的傷害。
results.example_en: The storm did damage to the house.
results.example_zh_tw: 暴風雨對房子造成了損害。

results.definition_en: The chance that something bad may happen.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 危險；可能發生壞事的可能性。
results.example_en: Keep the baby out of danger.

results.definition_en: A female child of a parent.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 女兒；雙親的女性子嗣。
results.example_en: Her daughter is in school.
